response.overview: This is not a Love story, What people keep calling “Love” nowadays often feels like a staged act, something unstable that survives only as repetition until they lose all meaning. It stays alive, but not whole. It’s sort of like a word that collapses the moment it’s spoken, a declaration that doesn’t match the experience.  This is not a Romance story, Love leads people into where thoughts are no longer free. Romance is so dead, but until romance isn't constitutional, until people learn to do anal, until Love isn’t something they dig for more. But just to be free from indecisiveness, to be free from labels of indifferences, to seek life like chameleons.
response.tagline: This is not a Love story
response.title: LOVE
